log.already-credited: [{{source}}] '{{fishName}}' is already credited in the collection; skipped.
log.credit-needed: [{{source}}] Uncredited fish found; applying collection credit: {{fishName}}
log.credit-success: [{{source}}] '{{fishName}}' was credited to the collection (I Caught This Continued).
log.credit-no-change: [{{source}}] vanilla caughtFish didn't change the collection for '{{fishName}}'.
hud.already-credited: {{fishName}} is already in the Fish Collection.
config.mode.name: Trigger mode
config.mode.tooltip: Choose whether fish are credited automatically when they enter your inventory, or only when you press the manual trigger key.
config.trigger-key.name: Manual trigger key
config.trigger-key.tooltip: The key used to credit the currently held fish when manual mode is enabled.
